basic_details.job_title: PAU Pani Krishi Mitra Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.post_name: Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper)
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website https://www.pau.edu. A total of 3 Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) vacancies have been announced through the PAU Pani Krishi Mitra Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: PAU Pani Krishi Mitra Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PAU Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper)

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper): Rs. 12526 Per Month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for PAU Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: PAU Pani Krishi Mitra Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) for various posts. PAU is a renowned agricultural institution.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Pani Krishi Mitra, which is equivalent to a Junior Field/Lab Helper position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Pani Krishi Mitra?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for PAU Pani Krishi Mitra Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the PAU Pani Krishi Mitra Recruitment 2026 is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend directly.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for these posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Pani Krishi Mitra posts is scheduled for 08 July 2026. Candidates should report on time.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Pani Krishi Mitra at PAU?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Pani Krishi Mitra post will receive a salary of Rs. 12526 per month as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the PAU Pani Krishi Mitra Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Pani Krishi Mitra posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Pani Krishi Mitra (equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Pani Krishi Mitra posts will be conducted in Ludhiana, Punjab. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Punjab Agricultural University?
faq.answer: The official website for Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) is https://pau.edu, where candidates can find more information.
